top_signals.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
top_signals.summary: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, Web3 and crypto regulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Kraken wins $22 million arbitration against auditor Mazars for ditching the firm during Operation Choke Point 2.0
top_signals.summary: Payward sued its former auditor, Mazars, for abandoning a nearly complete audit during Operation Choke Point 2.0.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Allstate Sued by Oklahoma for Alleged Scheme to Underpay Claims
top_signals.summary: Oklahoma’s attorney general sued Allstate Corp., alleging the insurer schemed to minimize payouts to homeowners for wind and hailstorm damage in order to boost its profits.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Netflix, Disney and YouTube interested in FIFA World Cup U.S. rights, package could reach $2 billion
top_signals.summary: FIFA has alerted media companies that English- and Spanish-language U.S. rights are likely to be sold together for 2030 and 2034, likely driving up the price.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
